brief_justification: Arrives at the exact correct answer with a valid concrete counterexample schedule; goes one level beyond stating the answer by constructing and checking a solution, but does not explore constraint interactions or why the problem is non-trivial; no explicit reflection on reasoning process, potential pitfalls, or assumptions — just executes the construction linearly; systematically verifies all 7 constraints against the proposed schedule in a structured checklist; presents the conclusion confidently without acknowledging whether the solution is unique, whether assumptions were made, or what would invalidate it; only one solution is constructed with no mention of alternatives or exploration of the solution space; every cell in the schedule and every constraint check is fully shown, enabling complete reproduction by a third party.
